name: The Dog API
description: Hundreds of dog breed images, breed info, and voting — perfect for pet apps and ML training datasets.
longDescription: The Dog API provides access to over 10,000 dog images across hundreds of breeds and sub-breeds, along with breed information, temperament data, weight/height ranges, and life span. It also includes a voting feature so users can like/dislike dogs. The API is commonly used for pet apps, machine learning image datasets, and developer sandboxes. Free tier requires an API key.
pricing: Free: unlimited requests with free API key
affiliateText: Building a pet app? Store breed data on Supabase — free tier for small projects.
